basics.name: John Doe
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Innovative Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience in building scalable web applications. Proficient in full-stack development, cloud architecture, and leading high-performing engineering teams.

work.name: TechGiant Corp
work.summary: Leading the core platform team responsible for microservices architecture and developer experience.
highlights: Architected a distributed system handling 1M+ requests per second
Reduced deployment times by 40% through CI/CD optimization

work.name: StartupHub
work.summary: Early employee responsible for building the initial MVP and scaling the frontend architecture.
highlights: Built the flagship React application from scratch
Integrated complex third-party APIs for real-time data processing

volunteer.summary: Core maintainer for several popular utility libraries used by the community.
highlights: Resolved over 200+ security vulnerabilities in community projects

awards.title: Engineering Excellence Award
awards.summary: Recognized for outstanding contributions to platform stability.

references.name: Jane Smith
references.reference: John is an exceptional engineer who consistently delivers high-quality code. His ability to solve complex problems is unmatched.
